name: create_transfer
description: Initiate a money transfer based on an existing quote and a target recipient account. This creates the transfer in a pending state but does not fund it. You must call fund_transfer separately to actually move the money.

parameters.name: targetAccount
parameters.description: The ID of the recipient account to send money to. Must be created beforehand via create_recipient.

parameters.name: quoteUuid
parameters.description: The UUID of the quote that defines the currencies, amounts, and rate for this transfer.

parameters.name: customerTransactionId
parameters.description: A unique UUID you generate to ensure idempotency. Prevents duplicate transfers if you retry the request.

parameters.name: details
parameters.description: Optional transfer details such as a reference message that appears on the recipient's bank statement.
